name: libergent
description: Cloudflare Worker app for searching Romanian second-hand marketplaces with direct parsers.

scripts.search:live: LIBERGENT_MOCK_SEARCH=0 LIBERGENT_MOCK_PROVIDER=0 node src/cli.js search --site all --provider auto --pages 1 --pretty
scripts.deploy: npm run build:ui && npx wrangler deploy
